LOOP-93 · SJK-CDU-III-HPCL-093 · pipeline: render → legend → detect → read → reconcile → BOM map (4a) → PMS map (4b) → report grounding → verify → crop⋈report match.
Keys shown blue resolve to an inspection-report line (30.x); grey keys are the drawing's own callouts (B93.x). BOM & report joins computed deterministically — OpenCV/geometry owns counts, the read owns semantics.
